title: echinocereus pectinatus subsp. ctenoides
intro: Echinocereus pectinatus subsp. ctenoides, also known as the cactus hedgehog, is a type of cactus plant that belongs to the Echinocereus genus. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits of Echinocereus pectinatus subsp. ctenoides include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce inflammation, and treat various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into infusions, decoctions, or tinctures, and are often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health issues.
